comments.text: Happy Sunday #stunday When standing in the presence of greatness, we are but small. #FebuARTy #big&small #aurora #lakesuperior
Wishing everyone a safe and relaxing Victoria Day. Hope you’re able to enjoy the long weekend with family and friends—and take in the beauty of Lake Superior and our Northern communities.
Very cool and real clouds and sky for April Fools' Day #clouds #storm #stormsky #aprilfools #greatlakes #lakeontario #springsky #spring #auntieem
Windy, wintry weather on its way to #WestMichigan ❄️ #MonaLakeChannel #NortonShores #Muskegon

Happy #Monday afternoon from the #Northland! It has been #wet across most of the region, which is greatly appreciated. The #temperatures remain #cooler by the lake, but it does feel #humid across the area. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Thursday afternoon Northland! The skies are starting to clear of the cloud cover from earlier today as temperatures remain seasonally mild. It is a windy day, especially the farther north you live. It's quite choppy on Lake Superior.

Happy #Monday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a second straight day of #sunshine, #warm #temperatures, and light #winds. Thanks to a lighter lake #breeze, it is a warmer day for some near #LakeSuperior. No big reason to complain about this #spring-time […] [Original post on newsie.social]
Happy Monday from the gloomy, damp, rainy but unseasonably warm Great Lakes. Climate change is real.
Happy Sunday, Jon. It's not much warmer here in the Great Lakes area.

RECAP OF 2024 IN THE NORTHLAND: PART TWO It's time to look at two of the communities that reside along Lake Superior and see how warm and wet(?) last year was. Here's more on Ashland and Grand Marais. Enjoy: www.facebook.com/WeathermanRu...

Happy Sunday afternoon from the Northland! After a warm start to the weekend for nearly everyone in the region, the lake breeze is back along the Lake Superior shorelines. At least we are all enjoying the sunshine. Get's use to it!

Happy #Monday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a slightly #warmer day for the region, but it remains a bit #cool by #LakeSuperior with a bit of #breeze coming from the lake. #Clouds are increasing as a #storm system brings #showers and #thunderstorms later […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a #sunny #summer day for the region, but a #wind shift that is now coming off #LakeSuperior is helping to keep the shoreline communities #cooler and more comfortable. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! It is a cooler day thanks to more cloud cover and an east wind. It will keep the waters along Lake Superior choppy. A few showers are starting to form and push through the region. Expect more of that the next few days.

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It is a more #seasonal early #spring day for the region thanks to #cloud cover and a #breeze off #LakeSuperior. Those in northwest #Wisconsin and the #UpperPeninsula will have to deal with #snow #shower through […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! Any fog and cloud cover is clearing out of the region for the rest of this afternoon and evening. We are all feeling the muggy conditions, pushing heat index values into the mid-90s away from Lake Superior.

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! Any #fog and #cloud cover is clearing out of the region for the rest of this afternoon and evening. We are all feeling the #muggy conditions, pushing #heat index values into the mid-90s away from #LakeSuperior. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx
Happy Monday afternoon from the Northland! It has been wet across most of the region, which is greatly appreciated. The temperatures remain cooler by the lake, but it does feel humid across the area.

Happy Sunday afternoon from the Northland! Lake Superior is playing a role in today's weather in the region. Those next to it are cooler with a lake breeze, with fog near the Twin Ports. Those away from it are enjoying summer heat and humidity.

Happy #Sunday afternoon from the #Northland! #LakeSuperior is playing a role in today's #weather in the region. Those next to it are #cooler with a lake #breeze, with #fog near the #TwinPorts. Those away from it are enjoying #summer #heat and #humidity. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It's another #sunny and #warm day for the region, with #cooler by the lake conditions continuing. The #dry conditions also persist, so please be careful with any #burning or #fires the rest of today. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! The #humidity and #temperatures are higher in the region, but it remains #cooler by #LakeSuperior. There's more #cloud cover, and some additional #showers and #thunderstorms will pass through in a few spots. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a mostly #cool and #dreary day for the region thanks to some #showers, some #fog near #LakeSuperior, and overall #cloud cover. Some spots in northwest #Wisconsin and the #UpperPeninsula are enjoying the #warm […] [Original post on newsie.social]

7 P.M. #RADAR UPDATE: The #severe #weather threat in the #Northland has passed as the line of scattered #showers and #thunderstorms is in the marine layer of air near #LakeSuperior. Some moderate #rainfall and gusty #winds are still possible for the #NorthShore this hour. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx

Happy Monday afternoon from the Northland! I'm back at the station, and still seeing some air quality issues with wildfire smoke lingering around the Great Lakes. Otherwise, we're just watching the radar for some showers as seasonal conditions persist.

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! It's been a calmer and slightly cooler day for the region as a storm system begins to push through the western Great Lakes area. We will see shower chances increase and persist the rest of the day and tonight.

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It's been a #calmer and slightly #cooler day for the region as a #storm system begins to push through the western Great Lakes area. We will see #shower chances increase and persist the rest of the day and tonight […] [Original post on newsie.social]

#Winds have become strong across the #Northland, with #gusts over 40 mph already being recorded. They will remain this way through the overnight hours, and will be strongest along the #Northshore. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It is a #warmer day, with lighter #winds making it feel not as #cold as Monday. The #sunshine is persistent for most of us, but so are the #clouds in the Arrowhead and South Shore snowbelt regions. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy #Thursday afternoon rom the #Northland! It's another 3cool day with #windchill readings below zero at times. There isn't much #sunshine, and nearly all #snow #showers are taking place along the South Shore. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! It's a sunny and warm late March day in the region. A lake breeze is starting to form along the Lake Superior shoreline. Enjoy these conditions as a new storm system begins to impact the area Friday.

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a #sunny and #warm late March day in the region. A lake #breeze is starting to form along the #LakeSuperior shoreline. Enjoy these conditions as a new #storm system begins to impact the area Friday. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! It's nice to have the sunshine back in the region. Temperatures are trying to warm up, but a breeze off Lake Superior will keep shoreline communities somewhat cool for April.

Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! It's a similar weather day for the region compared to the past several days, but with two exceptions. One, there are fewer pop-up showers than Tuesday.
Two, it is slightly warmer closer to Lake Superior.

Happy #Wednesday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a similar #weather day for the region compared to the past several days, but with two exceptions. One, there are fewer pop-up #showers than Tuesday.
Two, it is slightly #warmer near the #LakeSuperior shoreline. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! It's a little more active with the pop-up showers in the region. More spots will see them the rest of this afternoon and evening. Temperatures remain seasonal with a slight lake breeze continuing.

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a little more active with the pop-up #showers in the region. More spots will see them the rest of this afternoon and evening. #Temperatures remain #seasonal with a slight lake #breeze continuing. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Monday afternoon from the Northland! The weather has cooperative with Memorial Day observances in the region with plenty of sunshine, seasonal temperatures, and a light lake breeze. Clouds are popping up, and a few showers could fall in spots.

Happy #Monday afternoon from the #Northland! The #weather has cooperative with #MemorialDay observances in the region with plenty of #sunshine, #seasonal #temperatures, and a light lake #breeze. #Clouds are popping up, and a few #showers could fall in spots […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! We are seeing some lingering showers in the southern half of the region, but they will move out this afternoon. It's another cool day for most, but winds will be shifting away from coming off Lake Superior soon.

Happy Monday afternoon from the Northland! The cool side of spring continues with well below average temperatures, especially near Lake Superior. At least we are dry for now, but an approaching storm system will keep the clouds coming.

Happy Sunday afternoon from the Northland! This may be one of the warmest Mother's Day the region has seen in history with the only relief from the heat right next to Lake Superior. The dry air and breezy southerly winds have led to extreme fire danger levels. DO NOT BURN!

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! It's a repeat of Wednesday's weather conditions with sunshine, a breeze coming off Lake Superior, and seasonal temperatures. Fire dangers remain elevated, so please be cautious if burning today.

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a repeat of Wednesday's #weather conditions with #sunshine, a #breeze coming off #LakeSuperior, and #seasonal #temperatures. #Fire dangers remain elevated, so please be cautious if burning today. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! It's back to the sunshine across the region, but a wind off Lake Superior is cooling temperatures closer to seasonal. The persistent dry conditions are keeping fire dangers elevated. Use caution if burning.

Happy #Wednesday afternoon from the #Northland! There's more #sunshine across the region, but a #wind off #LakeSuperior is cooling #temperatures closer to #seasonal. The persistent #dry conditions are keeping #fire dangers elevated. Use caution if burning. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! It's a summer-like day across the entire region. Even the lakeshore is warming up to the 70s and 80s. It is a dry heat, so be cautious if you want to burn or have a lit firepit today.

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a #summer-like day across the entire region. Even the #lakeshore is warming up to the 70s and 80s for high #temperatures. It is a dry #heat, so be cautious if you want to burn or have a lit firepit today. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Monday afternoon from the Northland! It's a second straight day of sunshine and light winds. Thanks to a lighter lake breeze, it is a warmer day for some near Lake Superior. No big reason to complain about this spring-time weather!

Happy #Sunday afternoon from the Northland! #After a #warm start to the weekend for nearly everyone in the region, the lake #breeze is back along the #LakeSuperior shorelines. At least we are all enjoying the #sunshine. Get's use to it! #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! It's another cool day for many in the region thanks to a breeze off Lake Superior. The threat for more rain, and a possible thunderstorms, will increase the farther south you live.

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! It's another #cool day for many in the region thanks to a #breeze off #LakeSuperior. The threat for more #rain, and a possible #thunderstorms, will increase the farther south you live. Some heavy #rainfall is […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Sunday afternoon from the Northland! It has been a very warm and humid weekend for most of the region. Let's just say it is "Superior" to be next to the big lake if you want relief from the heat. More storms are in the forecast for tonight.

Happy #Sunday afternoon from the #Northland! It has been a very #warm and #humid weekend for most of the region. Let's just say it is "#Superior" to be next to the big lake if you want relief from the #heat. More #storms are in the #forecast for tonight. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Friday afternoon from the Northland! Helping out again at the station to end the week, and a happy Summer Solstice to all who celebrate. It is feeling more like the season, with cooler by the lake conditions. However, a very stormy night is expected...

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! It is cooler by Lake Superior thanks to a shift in wind direction to the east. Whether you are cool or warm, everyone will have a chance for showers and thunderstorms. A few could have hail and strong winds late.

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! It is cooler by #LakeSuperior thanks to a shift in #wind direction to the east. Whether you are #cool or #warm, everyone will have a chance for #showers and #thunderstorms. A few could have #hail and strong […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Friday afternoon from the Northland. Helping out at the station today, and I'm doing my best to enjoy a spring-like weather day thanks to cool temperatures and a breeze off the lake. At least the showers south of Highway 2 are beginning to move out.

Happy #Friday afternoon from the #Northland. Helping out at the station today, and I'm doing my best to enjoy a #spring-like #weather day thanks to #cool #temperatures and a #breeze coming off #LakeSuperior At least the #showers south of Highway 2 are […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! It's a cooler summer day for the region, especially those spots where the wind coming off Lake Superior are being felt the most. Clouds are increasing as showers and thunderstorms arrive for most by tonight.

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a #cooler #summer day for the region, especially those spots where the #wind coming off #LakeSuperior are being felt the most. #Clouds are increasing as #showers and #thunderstorms arrive for most by tonight […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! The humidity and temperatures are higher in the region, but it remains cooler by Lake Superior. There's more cloud cover, and some additional showers and storms will pass through in a few spots.

Happy Monday afternoon from the Northland! It's a slightly warmer day for the region, but it remains a bit cooler by Lake Superior with a bit of breeze coming from the lake. Clouds are increasing as a storm system brings showers and thunderstorms later today and tonight.

Happy Sunday afternoon from the Northland! It's a great weather day to end the extended holiday weekend with plenty of sunshine and comfortable dew points. Temperatures are cooler by Lake Superior thanks to a lake breeze.

Happy #Sunday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a great #weather day to end the extended holiday weekend with plenty of #sunshine and comfortable #dewpoints. #Temperatures are #cooler by #LakeSuperior thanks to a lake breeze. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! It's a sunny summer day for the region, but a wind shift that is now coming off Lake Superior is helping to keep the shoreline communities cooler and more comfortable.

Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! The clouds and fog are clearing out of the region, so everyone should see some sunshine before evening. It's a seasonal day, with a bit of lake breeze to keep humidity levels from getting too muggy.

Happy Sunday afternoon from the Northland! It's been a cooler day thanks to a strong breeze coming off Lake Superior. A bit choppy on the lake through this evening. More showers and a few thunderstorms will pass through this evening and Monday.

Happy #Sunday afternoon from the #Northland! It's been a #cooler #summer day thanks to a strong #breeze coming off #LakeSuperior. A bit choppy on the lake through this evening. More #showers and a few #thunderstorms will pass through this evening, tonight and […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! It's pretty similar conditions to 24 hours ago with a mix of sun, clouds, haze, and a few showers. Air quality remains at slightly unhealthy levels, seasonal temperatures, and slightly humid. There is a breeze off Lake Superior. That's a change!

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! It is a cooler day compared to the record heat we saw Monday, thanks to more cloud cover and a breeze off Lake Superior. I can't rule out a rogue sprinkle or two, but the overall dry pattern continues.

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It is a #cooler day compared to the #record #heat we saw Monday, thanks to more 3cloud cover and a #breeze off #LakeSuperior. I can't rule out a rogue #sprinkle or two, but the overall #dry pattern continues. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! It is a #cooler day thanks to more #cloud cover and an east #breeze. It will keep the waters along #LakeSuperior choppy. A few #showers are starting to form and push through the region. Expect more of that the […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! The fog has dissipated across the region, but it will remain an issue next to Lake Superior, with some of it coming on shore tonight and Friday morning. It remains warm and dry, but showers and storms are coming for some starting tonight.

DENSE FOG LIKELY TONIGHT: The #fog has stayed put over #LakeSuperior this Wednesday, and it will be forming back over the #Northland tonight and Thursday morning. Again, take it easy when traveling about with low beams on! #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! The foggy start to the day is giving way to plenty of sunshine and mild temperatures. A bit of wind coming off Lake Superior will keep lakeshore communities cooler with some fog in spots.

Happy #Wednesday afternoon from the #Northland! The #foggy start to the day is giving way to plenty of #sunshine and #mild #temperatures. A bit of #wind coming off #LakeSuperior will keep lakeshore communities #cooler with some #fog in spots. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! Welcome to October, and we keep welcoming back summer-like heat to the region. There is a slight lake breeze keeping the Lake Superior shoreline communities cooler. The clouds are breaking up, so enjoy the sunshine the rest of today.

Happy #Wednesday afternoon from the #Northland! Welcome to #October, and we keep welcoming back #summer-like #heat to the region. There is a slight lake #breeze keeping the #LakeSuperior shoreline communities cooler. The #clouds are breaking up, so enjoy the […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Monday afternoon from the Northland! Must like the past few days, it is a warmer day away from the influence of the breeze coming off Lake Superior. It is dry, but a messy quick storm system will bring mixed precipitation tonight and Tuesday morning.

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! The best way to describe the weather in the region would be typical for late March and early spring. It is cooler by the lake with a bit of wind off Lake Superior with some sunshine breaking through the cloud cover.

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! There is plenty of sunshine for the rest of today, which will help to push temperatures into the 40s and 50s. The exception (there's usually one) is along the Lake Superior shoreline. A weak lake breeze will limit this heat.

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! There is plenty of #sunshine for the rest of today, which will help to push #temperatures into the 40s and 50s. The exception (there's usually one) is along the #LakeSuperior shoreline. A weak lake #breeze will […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! It is a more seasonal early spring day for the region thanks to cloud cover and a breeze off Lake Superior. Those in northwest Wisconsin and the Upper Peninsula will have to deal with snow shower through Wednesday morning.

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland. It is a colder day in the region thanks to persistent cloud cover and fog near Lake Superior. That fog and the freezing drizzle it contains will create some slick spots on area roadways and surfaces through tonight.

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland. It is a #colder but #seasonal day in the region thanks to persistent #cloud cover and #fog near #LakeSuperior. That fog and the #freezing #drizzle it contains will create some #slick spots on area roadways and […] [Original post on newsie.social]
Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! The sunshine continues, as well as the very warm temperatures. Despite the southerly breeze, it is cooler by Lake Superior in spots.

Happy #Wednesday afternoon from the #Northland! The #sunshine continues, as well as the very #warm #temperatures. Despite the southerly #breeze, it is #cooler by #LakeSuperior in spots. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! Unless you are right next to Lake Superior, you are enjoying a very warm and sunny spring day in the region. The dry and breezy conditions are going to increase fire danger levels, especially west of Highway 53.

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! Unless you are right next to #LakeSuperior, you are enjoying a very #warm and #sunny #spring day in the region. The #dry and #breezy conditions are going to increase #fire danger levels, especially west of […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! It is becoming more and more sunny across the region as cloud cover moves out of the area. Temperatures are cooler by the lake, but we are overall warmer than this time Tuesday.

Happy #Wednesday afternoon from the #Northland! It is becoming more and more #sunny across the region as #cloud cover moves out of the area. #Temperatures are #cooler by the lake, but we are overall #warmer than this time Tuesday. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! It's a mostly cool and dreary day for the region thanks to some showers, some fog near Lake Superior, and cloud cover. Some spots in northwest Wisconsin and the Upper Peninsula are enjoying the warm side of spring.

Happy Sunday afternoon from the Northland! The final day of May and meteorologist spring is going to be another dry and cooler by the lake weather day. It is quite dry north of Highway 2, so be alert with any burning or fires the rest of today.

Happy #Sunday afternoon from the #Northland! The final day of #May and #meteorologist #spring is going to be another #dry and #cooler by the lake #weather day. It is quite dry north of Highway 2, so be alert with any #burning or #fires the rest of today. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! It is basically a repeat of Wednesday's weather conditions for today. That means plenty of sunshine and cooler by Lake Superior with a bit of lake breeze blowing.

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! It is basically a repeat of Wednesday's #weather conditions for today. That means plenty of #sunshine and #cooler by #LakeSuperior with a bit of lake #breeze blowing. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! There are no fears for severe weather the rest of today with plenty of sunshine overhead. The biggest issue is the wind coming off Lake Superior. It's leading to a wide range of temperatures.

Happy #Wednesday afternoon from the #Northland! There are no fears for #severe #weather the rest of today with plenty of #sunshine overhead. The biggest issue is the #wind coming off #LakeSuperior. It's leading to a wide range of #temperatures. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! It's another summer-like weather day for most of the region. That means a chance for pop-up showers and thunderstorms south of Highway 2. A wind shift to the east will keep the Lake Superior shoreline cooler, but the heat continues one more day.

Happy #Tuesday afternoon from the #Northland! It's another #summer-like #weather day for most of the region. That means a chance for pop-up #showers and #thunderstorms south of Highway 2. A #wind shift to the east will keep the #LakeSuperior shoreline #cooler […] [Original post on newsie.social]

Happy Monday afternoon from the Northland! It is becoming a very warm day for many in the area, but there is some heat relief right next to Lake Superior. It's been sunny, but clouds will increase with pop-up showers and thunderstorms possible in a few spots.

Happy #Monday afternoon from the #Northland! It is becoming a very #warm #MemorialDay for many in the area, but there is some #heat relief right next to #LakeSuperior. It's been #sunny, but #clouds will increase with pop-up #showers and #thunderstorms […] [Original post on newsie.social]
Happy Thursday afternoon from the Northland! It's a sunny day with not much cloud cover in the region. A lake breeze is keeping those next to Lake Superior cooler than further inland.

Happy #Thursday afternoon from the #Northland! It's a #sunny day with not much #cloud cover in the region. A lake #breeze is keeping those next to #LakeSuperior #cooler than further inland. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Sunday afternoon from the Northland! Cooler temperatures have returned for most of us thanks to a strong lake breeze. Most of us are dry this afternoon, but showers and thunderstorms will cover the region overnight.

Happy #Sunday afternoon from the #Northland! Cooler #temperatures have returned for most of us thanks to a strong lake #breeze. Most of us are #dry this afternoon, but #showers and #thunderstorms will cover the region overnight. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Wednesday afternoon from the Northland! It is a spring-like weather day for the region thanks to very cool temperatures and a light breeze off Lake Superior. Showers continue across most of the region, with chances persisting through this evening.

Happy #Wednesday afternoon from the #Northland! It is a #spring-like #weather day for the region thanks to very #cool #temperatures and a light #breeze off #LakeSuperior. #Showers continue across most of the area, with chances persisting through this evening. #wxtooter #wx #MNwx #WIwx #UPwx

Happy Tuesday afternoon from the Northland! It's another sunny and warm day for the region, with cooler by the lake conditions continuing. The dry conditions also persist, so please be careful with any burning or fires the rest of today.

Happy Monday afternoon from the Northland! It is the start of June and meteorological summer. However, the same weather pattern of the past few days persists. Enjoy the clearing skies, cooler by the lake, and beware elevated fire danger levels.

WIND ADVISORY: Due to the strong winds near #LakeSuperior along the northern portion of the #NorthShore, a #Wind #Advisory is in effect for parts of Cook County in the #Northland through 3 a.m. #Gusts have been and could be up to 50 mph at times. #wxtooter #weather #wx #MNwx
